---
title: Mock Test
description: A compact cumulative review set.
---

Use this page as a timed review. Work without looking at earlier notes first,
then return to the relevant topic pages.

::: {.practice-box}
1. Solve `5x - 10 = 15`.
2. Evaluate `f(3)` for `f(x) = x^2 + 1`.
3. Differentiate `x^3`.
4. Integrate `2x` from `0` to `4`.
5. Compute `C(6, 3)`.
6. Compute the standard deviation conceptually: what does it measure?
7. What is the norm of `[3, 4]`?
8. What does `p -> q` mean?
:::
